question: What shape is shown below?
explanation: The shape matches the properties of a rectangle.

svg.content:
<svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100%" height="200px" style="max-width: 300px; margin: auto; display: block;">
  <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="60" fill="none" stroke="#fbc02d" stroke-width="3"/>
  <line x1="100" y1="100" x2="160" y2="100" stroke="#fbc02d" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="4"/>
  <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="3" fill="#fbc02d"/>
</svg>
